name: Elegy of Light
additional_info: On use, Deep Gems cannot have their effects proc on you and your Deem Gems have increased effectiveness in PvE for 3 minutes. This ability requires you to kill a player of equal or higher level or a boss to recharge its effect.
desc: The Unspoken Vow of the Waking God resonates through you, if briefly. Protects you from the effects of Deep Gems for 3 minutes and provides you Gem Enhancement. Remains dormant until you take the life of an equal.
